title: hieracium transalpinum
intro: Hieracium transalpinum, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
